svg.title: AXON development ecosystem — IDE layer, LSP server, CLI, compilation targets, model providers, and three-level testing stack
svg.desc: Layered structural diagram showing the AXON toolchain from IDE integrations at the top through LSP server, CLI, three compilation targets, five model providers, and a testing stack at the bottom.
svg.text: IDE → LSP → CLI → compilation targets → model providers → testing

g.text: build · run · serve · test · eval · fmt

svg.text: Testing stack — three levels, increasing cost and latency
API keys in axon.toml as ${ENV_VAR} only — never in .ax source files
